diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Core Governance Reward Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.7.1.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](e76c0b88-7755-4611-a884-9b5bd3d9c4d8), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.7.1.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](5eb6faea-c685-450c-a9ba-601ce68ac690).

This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Core Governance Reward Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.7.1.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](e76c0b88-7755-4611-a884-9b5bd3d9c4d8), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.7.1.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](5eb6faea-c685-450c-a9ba-601ce68ac690).
